payload.task:
Fix SRC-BUG-002 (attempt 2/3): No server logs: logs/MOD-website/structured.jsonl.

Server logs directory is empty. Requests are not being logged.
FILES TO CHECK: build/main.py, mod_website/structured_log.py, src/tracing.py
ROOT CAUSE: mod_website/structured_log.py uses Python logging.getLogger() which does NOT write to logs/ directory.
FIX: Replace 'from mod_website.structured_log import StructuredLogEmitter' with 'from src.tracing import StructuredLogEmitter' in build/main.py.
The src.tracing.StructuredLogEmitter writes JSONL to logs/MOD-website/.
ACTION: Update build/main.py to use the correct emitter and verify logs appear.

PROJECT: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
Read FILES TO CHECK mentioned above before making changes.
Use bash to run: python -m pytest tests/ -q to verify fixes.
